chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Acq. Appeal No. D – 31 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.02.2018. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTIONS. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Mr. Abid Ali Thebo, Advocate for the appellants. Mr. Asif Choudhry, Advocate for respondents 2 to 5. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. -------- It is stated by the counsel for the appellants that this Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.D-31 of 2017, has been filed by the brothers and sisters of deceased Mukhtar Ahmed. Learned A.P.G. pointed out that in this matter deceased Mukhtar Ahmed though married with Mst. Kulsoom but he was issueless therefore, according to the learned A.P.G. the brother and the sisters are nothing to do with the compromise arrived at between the parties in the trial court if the parents of the deceased are alive. When this fact was confronted to learned counsel for the appellant he submits that under the circumstances he doesn’t press this Criminal Acquittal Appeal. In view of the above, this Criminal Acquittal Appeal is dismissed as withdrawn along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.
